title: "Post Title"
description: "Brief description of the post"
author: "Your Name"
date: "2024-01-24"
categories: [machine-learning, python]
image: "image.jpg"  # optional thumbnail
draft: true 
---

## Introduction

Your technical content here...

## Math and Code

You can include:

$$
E = mc^2
$$
```python
import numpy as np
# Your code
```

## Figures

![Caption](path/to/figure.png)
